← Ontology

♾️ Commons_Governance_Protocols

Parent item
33314415-10e1-8140-bdba-ddbb869636fc
long_description
Shared resources—land, water, data—need rules that prevent tragedy and enclosure alike. Protocols for commons are agreements about use, care, monitoring, and conflict—so “shared” does not mean “undefined.”
slug
Commons_Governance_Protocols
Activities
33314415-10e1-81a1-8aa3-c285283f43ef, 33314415-10e1-81ee-8f91-e2f3f5f1155f, 33314415-10e1-8185-9fe2-ed48e3412b04, 33314415-10e1-8179-99e3-f4bdb13e87fc, 33314415-10e1-8146-9ac7-f31f6771b639, 33314415-10e1-81a2-9210-e794d43de95f, 33314415-10e1-8199-b89c-ce879c1935a0, 33314415-10e1-8185-9c09-e674412ae33b
Description
Establishing practices and protocols for the shared stewardship of resources—such as land, water, and data—as commons.
parent_pattern_name
Community Governance
sort_order
8
